title:
🎓 *Part II: Higher Education*

Transforming Universities & Colleges 🚀

1.label: 🏛 Quality Universities & Colleges
1.summary: NEP aims to transform higher education institutions into multidisciplinary universities and colleges.
1.detail: The policy promotes holistic education, strong research culture, and institutional autonomy to improve global standards.
1.example: Example: A university offering engineering, arts, and science under one integrated system.

2.label: 🔄 Institutional Restructuring
2.summary: HEIs will be reorganized into large multidisciplinary institutions.
2.detail: The goal is to phase out small, fragmented colleges and move towards well-resourced institutions.
2.example: Example: Multiple small colleges merging into one autonomous university.

3.label: 🌐 Multidisciplinary Education
3.summary: Students can choose subjects across disciplines for holistic development.
3.detail: Flexibility in subject selection encourages creativity and critical thinking.
3.example: Example: A science student taking philosophy or music as elective subjects.

4.label: 🎓 Student Support Systems
4.summary: Support systems like scholarships and mentorship programs will be strengthened.
4.detail: The policy ensures equal opportunities and reduces financial barriers for students.
4.example: Example: National Scholarship Portal providing financial aid.

5.label: 👨‍🏫 Faculty Development
5.summary: Faculty recruitment and career progression will be transparent and merit-based.
5.detail: Continuous professional development and research incentives are emphasized.
5.example: Example: Faculty training programs and research grants.

6.label: ⚖ Equity & Inclusion
6.summary: Ensures inclusive access to higher education for disadvantaged groups.
6.detail: Special focus on gender balance and underrepresented communities.
6.example: Example: Reserved seats and targeted scholarships.

7.label: 📘 Teacher Education
7.summary: A 4-year integrated B.Ed. will be the minimum qualification for teachers.
7.detail: Teacher preparation programs will be multidisciplinary and research-based.
7.example: Example: Students completing integrated B.Ed. with subject specialization.

8.label: 🛠 Vocational Education
8.summary: Vocational education will be integrated into mainstream education.
8.detail: Students will have opportunities for internships and skill-based learning.
8.example: Example: Engineering student doing industry internship during degree.

9.label: 🔬 National Research Foundation
9.summary: NRF will fund and promote quality research across disciplines.
9.detail: It aims to strengthen research ecosystem in universities and colleges.
9.example: Example: Government-funded research grants for innovation projects.
